h16f72695g0dd4g4c4dg9622gf01826cd5656: Oh no. No. Why ain't I petrified?

h4da541e3g7a10g48b0gb6dfg571dbd23acfa: I s'pose I should count my blessings. Most ain't so lucky.
hdff581deg6a84g46a2gb03bg5ebfa4968d66: Look, greyling or not, you having a look put my mind at ease.
hbd4a96e6g613ag4e0cg86aag71c3d8d5f4ab: Not enough to hang around here, mind, but... thank you. And best of luck.
h1e4968afg6706g43b1g9c74g560c16775579: I don't fancy hangin' around here. But... thank you. And best of luck.
h7d84b9dbg6c6eg4ce2ga47bg20076e364168: Examine him for signs of Laduguer's Bite.
h4bd3869dgd01ag45edg9f88gc1af3ca57b8d: *As far as you can tell, he's in perfectly good health.*
h2bfb1039g6f4dg4ed7g98abg2ae059bd64bb: Examine him for signs of Laduguer's Bite.
h1bfb7c2bg7b81g4d14g8616g1da6bee63192: In the tales, hags always cook up their victim's misery first, then sell them false hope.
hb501d085g6100g44bbga778g3aaeb1068e5e: She made me sick. And then trapped me in stone for kicks.
hccb47d78g619ag4fccgab0dg380ef69cf287: I'm sorry this happened to you.
h8092bf68g172cg4135g8706gc344836bedbb: I left me wife, me kids behind, for fear of infecting them. They were only babes.
hc9b6e68dg31aeg4515g9c82gfeb9c777428c: The stones know how old they are now.
hfaff7c24ge26dg4789gac36gc67160fcbcd5: How long were you trapped like this?

hfb1847fbg06c9g48c5ga8b0g2fac5323b00a: No - what you've done for me and mine today won't be forgotten.
h3227bab9g201fg4705gb3cbg2d3dbde03b80: Damn it. You could've said as much from the start.
hd9c7863eg5265g4814ga7eegc689a1fb4e1c: I'll find another way. I swear to you.
h4a42c126g9647g4753g957dg288ab7bb0ac0: Oh, you'll figure it out. You owe me a debt, and I intend to collect.
h6f681b2egea08g4148g9e64g776103879bc2: You won't be left wanting. You've my word.
h44477f12g66feg4d46g992dg8d2f28582851: Hopefully they've grown. Children are disgusting.

h77a9e62dg3f0eg4ba7gae92g51e0a48cbfb7: I'll get to see them again, hold 'em again, 'cause of you. I - I ain't got not way to repay you.

h829b403bgec0eg4ba3gbd3fgdbf219e6cde0: Sorry - now ain't the time for blathering.
hac181648ge6abg4588gab69gb9e7fc77c362: But now you have many more years ahead of you.

h3352f83cg33e1g488dg8478g0d7fe810cc6c: I... only wish I could do more to repay you.
h4119900dga847g47c1ga797ga80d9e148500: I'm almost impressed - that's evil, even by a hag's standards.

hf6438287gbf40g454eg9888gb39ce2f54dbd: Attune with your blood and search him for magic.
h050c6ce1g72e6g45d5g8295g1a2958777e5e: I can feel the hag's magic on you - it tastes of sickness.
h9f0abab5gbe52g40d1gbacagf59856437598: What? Are you sayin' it wasn't the Bite? But... bloody hells.

h9d5d15e1g30dag4cf6gb4feg004268f454a4: No time for questions. Get out of here while you still can.
hba2edc01g3047g4ba2g9fffgd5f467144f30: Yer right. And look... thank you. I don't know how you pulled it off - but thank you.
h92e4a191g08f8g4112ga291g0f15f41798f5: Why d'ya think I'm here? The hag petrified me. Only way to stop it.

hb811be8dg8881g4a5dg8ffage2fdca823a7e: I had to. I was sick. Real sick. The hag petrified me - to stop it spreading.
h8387d67ag02d6g495cg8a8egc4df5b439def: The Bite's a terrible disease. I can see why you went to the hag.
h9782dfefgd244g4973g8e73gcb4b869a5195: Right? It was that or die covered in me own insides. It's why she petrified me - to stop the spread.

hacdaaae9g62b5g4ca1g8041g16d13f3cb9b3: Better dead than a greyling. Why d'ya think we call it Laduguer's Bite? After that slaver of a god you adore?

hcc7e567cg9cf2g4569g8c9cg50094571a634: Argh. The stones take you, you disgusting half-breed. I'll deal with this myself.

ha20fc64ag0251g4873gb4c5g471a1b7b806d: I... could you have a look?
hc2071661g5a3bg4d9fg8c63g70aa31b81475: Changed my mind. Enjoy tripping over your own guts.

h911afc10g3d73g4b1dg9663gff7a94013b65: I'm getting out of this hellhole. You'd best do the same.

ha7372bb1g880dg4299g9cefg895eda10a137: I was on death's door when the hag cast... wait. You didn't - you didn't cure the Bite?
